nodes.speaker: Queen Riley
nodes.text: Welcome to the Faerie Glade. The winds whisper of your arrival.

nodes.speaker: Queen Riley
nodes.text: The Windward Seal is a sacred token. I cannot grant it while our Fount of All Water is choked by corruption.

nodes.speaker: Queen Riley
nodes.text: Speak with Lauren, our Chief Water Engineer. She will guide you to the Fount. Cleanse it, and the seal shall be yours.

nodes.speaker: Queen Riley
nodes.text: The waters run clear once more! You have our eternal gratitude. As promised, here is the Windward Seal.
